title: Verify Analytics Events are Triggered Correctly
description: Test that key user actions fire the specified analytics events with the correct attributes.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the experiment cohort.

steps.description: 1. Load the homepage and view the widget.
3. On the Trial Corner, click the 'Remind me' toggle.
5. On the pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.

expected_result: The following events are fired in order: 'trial-corner-widget-viewed', 'trial-corner-widget-clicked', 'trial-corner-viewed', 'remind-me-clicked', 'cancel-clicked'. Each event must have the correct attributes as defined in the PRD.
